update.title: A new frontend version is available
update.description: Update now to switch to the latest page without clearing cache or forcing a refresh.

install.title: Install the UniKorn app
install.description: Get a smoother experience with offline support.

chrome.step1: Click the install icon on the right side of the address bar
chrome.step2: Or open the three-dot menu in the top-right corner
chrome.step4: Confirm the installation and start using the app

safari.step1: Tap the share button at the bottom
safari.step4: Confirm and the app will be added to your home screen

edge.step1: Click the app icon on the right side of the address bar
edge.step2: Or open the three-dot menu in the top-right corner
edge.step3: Choose “Install this site as an app”

profileRedirect.missingAuth: We could not find your login information. Redirecting to the login page...

guide.title: User guide
guide.summary: This page will gradually document UniKorn's core features so new users can get started quickly.
guide.sectionOneBody: Browse the forum, search course reviews, join activities, form teams, and manage your campus identity and profile.
guide.sectionTwoBody: Chinese remains the default language, while English pages are available under the /en prefix. New pages will follow the same approach.

rules.title: Community rules
rules.summary: Please follow these basic rules to keep the community welcoming and useful.
rules.sectionOneBody: Do not post harassment, discrimination, personal attacks, privacy violations, or intentionally inflammatory content.
rules.sectionTwoBody: Course reviews, team-matching posts, and requests for help should be as truthful and clear as possible to avoid misleading others.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.summary: UniKorn tries to collect only the data needed to run the platform and respects your visibility settings.
privacy.sectionOneBody: Account details, avatars, posts, comments, notifications, and required identity-verification data are used to provide platform features.
privacy.sectionTwoBody: You can manage your public profile, contact details, and some notification settings. A fuller privacy policy can be added later.

courses.subtitle: Browse and share course experiences

profileSetup.title: Set up your profile
profileSetup.subtitle: Introduce the problems you want to work on and add contact details so teammates can reach you.
profileSetup.problemSectionTitle: What kind of problems do you want to solve?
profileSetup.problemInterestLabel: Describe the problem space you care about *
profileSetup.problemInterestPlaceholder: For example: improving some part of campus life, exploring a technical field in depth, or solving a specific social problem...
profileSetup.helpText: It does not need to sound overly formal. The system will use AI to understand your interests and match suitable projects and teammates.
profileSetup.saveAndContinue: Save and continue to project discovery
profileSetup.saveFailed: Failed to save your profile. Please try again.

contact.title: Contact settings
contact.description: Choose the contact methods you want to share so other users can reach you.
contact.privacyBody: Your contact details may appear on your profile and posts. Only share information you are comfortable making public.
